source: ## Refund API (request table + code-block URL + Response table)

parameters.name: partner_key
parameters.description: Authentication key for each individual partner.

parameters.name: rec_trade_id
parameters.description: Identifier for the transaction being refunded.

parameters.name: bank_refund_id
parameters.description: Self-defined refund record identifier (half-shaped English number, must be unique).

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Only required for partial refund. Must include two decimal places (except TWD); e.g., '100' represents '$1.00'. Instalment, T2P transactions do not support partial refunds.

parameters.name: additional_data
parameters.description: Data will be encrypted and decrypted when other customization requirements.

parameters.name: merchandise_details
parameters.description: The item amount or points that are excluded from redeems. Only supported by some e-payments.

request.description: Refund request body. Sandbox: https://sandbox.tappaysdk.com/tpc/transaction/refund ; Production: https://prod.tappaysdk.com/tpc/transaction/refund. Headers: Content-Type: application/json, x-api-key: YourPartnerKey.

responses.description: Refund result. status=0 indicates success; fields refund_amount, refund_info{returned_reward_amount,returned_real_amount}, refund_id, bank_refund_order_number, is_captured, bank_result_code, bank_result_msg, currency. HTTP status not stated; 200 assumed.

missing: No example response JSON body (only a response field table)
No explicit non-200/error HTTP status codes documented (errors via in-body status/msg)
